/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/judge_worker.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/judge_worker.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/judge_worker.dir/config/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/judge_worker.dir/mq/rabbitmq_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/judge_worker.dir/db/mysql_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/judge_worker.dir/judge/status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/judge_worker.dir/judge/sandbox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/judge_worker.dir/judge/judge_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/judge_worker.dir/worker/worker.cpp.o -o judge_worker  -lrabbitmq -lmysqlclient -lspdlog -lfmt
